live.margin: SPOT 1x — no leverage, cannot be liquidated
live.take_profit: ride the trend; exit when the ensemble flips / regime changes

model_growth.note: Max B holds this position since 2026-06-07 (entry $63,332, daily close); the action stays until the model exits/flips or re-sizes — a new day does NOT re-price it. Cut-loss & liquidation are fixed from the entry price. How to trade 1.4x: set margin 5x and open a position worth 1.4x your equity (= 28% of funds posted as margin). Protection stack: 200WMA floor + Pi Cycle de-risk. Honest: maxDD -56%; losing years remain (2024/2025 in backtest).
